script: APP=b1d02264-28fe-49f1-ae71-b50b6809f852; echo '===== All emily-related secrets in vault =====' && az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query "[?contains(name,'emily')].name" -o tsv 2>&1; echo; echo '===== Format of the current stored secret =====' && SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name emily-claude-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); echo "  length=${#SECRET}"; echo "  first-30-chars=${SECRET:0:30}"; echo "  last-30-chars=${SECRET: -30}"; echo "  starts-with-curly=$(echo $SECRET | head -c 1)"; echo; echo '===== Existing credentials on the app reg =====' && az ad app credential list --id $APP 2>&1 | jq '[.[] | {keyId, displayName, hint, startDateTime, endDateTime, customKeyIdentifier}]' 2>&1 | head -30; echo; echo '===== Bot Aixa secret format for comparison =====' && AS=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name aixa-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); echo "  length=${#AS}  first-10=${AS:0:10}"
